what_it_does: This file is a ledger-style metadata record for a channel attachment in the design-assets channel, declaring an image attachment that targets image://design-assets/icons/image (18) and recording when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to 'design-assets/icons/image (18)'
standouts: The target URI contains spaces and parentheses ('image (18)')
The file is purely metadata with no embedded image or description
concerns: The target identifier 'image (18)' is ambiguous and may not be stable or resolvable
No alt text, dimensions, MIME type, or author are recorded
notes: A minimal ledger entry that links the design-assets channel to a specific image asset and records its addition time.
questions: What does 'image (18)' refer to and how is it resolved?
Is this attachment tied to a specific channel message or thread?
Why is the target path not URL-encoded or slugified?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the content: it records an image attachment for a channel, though it contains only metadata and no image data.
intention_signals: To create a durable, queryable record associating a channel with a specific image asset and capturing the moment it was added.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel and an image asset, supporting asset discovery, provenance, and retrieval in a fused ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata record for the design-assets channel referencing an image asset at image://design-assets/icons/image (18) added on 2026-06-22.
intention_for_embedding: To log an image attachment against the design-assets channel for later retrieval and reference.
